description: Predefined multi-country boundaries for OSM export. Each entry maps to regions/{id}.geojson.

australia_mainland_tasmania.title: Australia (mainland and Tasmania)
australia_mainland_tasmania.description: Mainland and Tasmania; outlying territories excluded.

britain_and_ireland.title: Britain and Ireland
britain_and_ireland.description: Great Britain (excl. Shetland) and the island of Ireland.

canada_southern_provinces.title: Canada (southern provinces)
canada_southern_provinces.description: Canada south of 60°N; excludes Yukon, NWT, Nunavut.

continental_europe.title: Continental Europe
continental_europe.description: Continental Europe Synchronous Area (ENTSO-E Regional Group) approximation.

east_africa.title: East Africa
east_africa.description: 11 East African countries from Eritrea/Djibouti south to Tanzania.

eastern_interconnection.title: Eastern Interconnection
eastern_interconnection.description: Eastern Interconnection approximate mask: central Canada to the Atlantic coast excluding Quebec.

europe.title: Europe
europe.description: 37 European units including UK, Ireland, Nordics, Turkey, Ukraine, Belarus, and Crimea; excludes Russia.

great_lakes.title: Great Lakes
great_lakes.description: Great Lakes region straddling the US Midwest and Ontario.

ireland_island.title: Ireland
ireland_island.description: Island of Ireland (Republic of Ireland + Northern Ireland).

japan_main_islands.title: Japan (main islands)
japan_main_islands.description: Four main islands plus adjacent small islands; excludes Okinawa, Ogasawara, Senkaku.

java_bali.title: Java and Bali
java_bali.description: Indonesian islands of Java and Bali.

latin_america.title: Latin America
latin_america.description: 48 entries from Mexico through Argentina, including the Caribbean and overseas territories.

malay_peninsula.title: Malay Peninsula
malay_peninsula.description: Peninsular Malaysia, Singapore, and southern Thailand.

salish_sea.title: Salish Sea
salish_sea.description: Southwestern British Columbia and northwestern Washington.

south_africa_no_prince_edward.title: South Africa
south_africa_no_prince_edward.description: South Africa mainland; excludes Prince Edward Islands.

south_asia.title: South Asia
south_asia.description: India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Bhutan, Sri Lanka.

uk_no_shetland.title: United Kingdom
uk_no_shetland.description: United Kingdom without the Shetland Islands.

us_canada_mainland.title: US and Canada (mainland)
us_canada_mainland.description: Continental US and Canadian mainland south of 60°N; excludes Alaska, Hawaii, Arctic islands.

us_mainland.title: United States (contiguous)
us_mainland.description: Contiguous United States (CONUS); excludes Alaska and Hawaii.

wecc.title: WECC / Western Interconnection
wecc.description: Western Electricity Coordinating Council footprint across western North America.
